functional_requirements: User can create an account using email and password.
Registration form must include fields: first name, last name, username, phone number, email, password, and confirm password.
System shall require email verification before first login.
System shall provide meaningful inline error messages for invalid inputs.
business_rules: Password must be between 8 and 12 characters in length.
Password must contain at least one number, one special character, and one alphabet character.
Account is not considered active until email is verified.
validations: Email format must be valid (exact regex not specified).
Password must meet complexity requirements (8-12 chars, include number, special, alphabet).
Required fields (first name, last name, username, phone number, email, password, confirm password) cannot be empty.
Duplicate email address must be detected and rejected with a meaningful error.
dependencies: Email verification service (e.g., sending verification email with link).
risks: Unclear email verification process (expiry, link format) may lead to user confusion.
Password special character set not defined, may cause inconsistency.
Lack of email format specification may lead to validation issues.
HTTP status codes for error responses not defined.
missing_information: Exact email format validation regex or rules.
List of allowed special characters in password.
Phone number format and validation rules.
First name and last name character limits.
Email verification process details (e.g., link expiration, resend mechanism).
Whether a password blacklist is required.
HTTP status codes for different error scenarios.
